review_title: One of the best security solutions I ever used!
description: In security, to have a product which is so easy to use, not too expensive and to get all the information you ever wanted, I always thought that this doesn't exist, until our company didn't started to work with Netwrix.
author: Matic K.
pros: The comprehensive auditing capabilities and real-time alerting system were the aspects I liked most about Netwrix Auditor. Additionally, the user-friendly interface and customizable reports were highly appreciated. The software's support for compliance requirements and easy deployment/integration were also significant advantages. Lastly, the knowledgeable customer support provided by Netwrix was another positive aspect that stood out to me.
cons: Although Netwrix Auditor offers many valuable features, I found the initial setup process to be somewhat challenging. However, once I overcame that hurdle, the overall experience was positive.

description: Used it for going on 5 years on an on-premise VM, works extremely well, low maintenance and the search functionality is much better than other vendors I've used in the past. It would be nice if it had functionality like AI to look for behavioral anomalies.
author: Jesse M.
pros: Ease of use and it was recommended to me by other Bankers at local conferences.
cons: Not available in a Linux appliance, would be nice if Netwrix come on a harden Linux appliance instead of running in Microsoft Windows/SQL.

author: Lauren G.
pros: Netwrix Auditor does what we need. The cost of the product is much less than the competition and that's a plus! The alerting is helpful, and the support we receive is efficient and great!
cons: In my opinion, I feel like the app could be better on how the reports come up and how quickly the results show. As much as the interface is much more user friendly that other competitors, it can be a little confusing when trying to search and pull reports/activity records.

review_title: A great force-multiplier for your IT Org!
description: 10/10, would use it again! The product is fantastic, and the support is excellent.
author: Tory L.
pros: Netwrix is a great force-multiplier for our organization, allowing a small team to monitor an entire infrastructure with ease.
cons: Initial implementation can be complex, but once it's working it's a set-it-and-forget-it solution. Support is great, however!

author: Darryl A.
pros: The simple, easy to read log, alert, subscription, and monitoring alerts. Very simple to send by emails.
cons: I like least the lack of being a SIEM because the collected log information is very simple compared to other log software.

description: Netwrix continues to be a justified investment to our network security.
author: Dan J.
pros: Netwrix provides a simple platform and ease of use.
cons: If Netwrix could somehow speed up the processing of certain aspects for searching, that would be wonderful.

description: My overall experience with Netwrix Auditor has been positive, mainly due to its robust auditing tools and reliable security features. However, the complexity of the software necessitated a longer-than-expected period of adaptation.
author: Bakeer J.
pros: The best aspect of Netwrix Auditor is its detailed auditing capabilities. The platform provides deep visibility into user activities and system changes, which is invaluable for IT security and compliance. Its real-time alerts and detailed reports make monitoring network environments much easier.
cons: The least appealing feature of Netwrix Auditor is its complexity and steep learning curve. New users may find the interface and multitude of features overwhelming, which can complicate the initial setup and daily operations.

description: I have had a positive experience with Netwrix Auditor. It may not have all the extras of other products, but it is a great value for the price and gives most sysadmins exactly what they need.
author: Lance T.
pros: The simplicity of using it and how it doesn't require a lot of setup and configuration.
cons: The query's do take a little knowledge of possible options to get the best, most concise results.

description: Overall positive but we will not renew. The product needs a major overhaul to keep up
author: Brett L.
pros: Tons of reports out of the box. Easy to install and deploy the agent. Support was great. Auditing was easy to pull back old data
cons: No web interface, it requires a thick client to be installed. Limited RBAC. The whole interface needs updating

description: A very useful toll for monitoring not only AD but other resources as well
author: Zisis Z.
pros: I like the way that collects data and instant alerts of non-compliance
cons: What they need to work most is the dashboard customization

description: It's been really great so far. The fact that one can customize the usage, as well as the ease of onboarding.
author: Peter A.
pros: How there are a lot of options in regards to monitoring
cons: I hope AI can be incorporated to Netwrix

description: Overall I like the product and plan to continue to utilize for our company.
author: Jon G.
pros: I like the real time alerts on changes to our AD.
cons: I feel I run into issues too often. Some of the UI is a little to complex to navigate.

author: Atif R.
pros: Granular Visibility: Provides in-depth insights into user activity and system changes. Compliance Assistance: Simplifies compliance reporting with pre-built reports and templates. Improved Security Posture: Helps identify and address security risks proactively. Scalability: Supports large and complex IT environments. User-Friendly Interface: Offers a web-based interface for easy access and management.
cons: Cost: Can be expensive for smaller organizations. Complexity: Initial setup and configuration require some technical expertise. Resource Consumption: Can be resource-intensive, especially for large deployments.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall experience with Netwrix is satisfactory
author: Arshdeep S.
pros: Email Notifications regarding pending days in password expiration
cons: Reminder email notifications to users about their password expiry

author: Aparna R.
pros: Its the best ever tool I have used. Love every piece of it
cons: Nothing much. It is the best ever I have seen

description: A great tool to monitor your servers and networks.
author: Vinh D.
pros: I would have to say support at Netwrix was great to work with.
cons: The complexity it takes to setup the software as there are so many options/feature.

description: Good value and great ease of use. Highly recommended overall!
author: Jerome C.
pros: The Password Reminder feature is a nice add on to the product to notify users of upcoming password expiration.
cons: Overall, Netwrix Auditor is a mature product. No complaint of any features.

review_title: Netwrix Rocks for my Annual SOC Reports
description: We are very satisfied with this product. No complaints overall!
author: Paul M.
pros: The easy reports it generates for auditing and compliance
cons: Tech Support could be better when questions arise.

description: Overall it's been good. Easy to use and for finding specific logs.
author: Omar H.
pros: The interface and the amount of predefined reports available.
cons: Errors during SQL creation. It was eventually resolved with help from the Netwrix support team.

author: Sarath C.
pros: email alerts when things like user deleted massive files when space is running out AD reports
cons: healthy issues on the data connectors had to move from azure to onprem to give more resources

review_title: Good Tool for Monitoring AD Environment
description: Overall, it is a great tool for my agency to monitor our AD health environment.
author: Pamela Z.
pros: Ability to track and record the users' logon activities, AD objects changes, and file access. I also like the reporting feature.
cons: Need to deploy on-prem. It would be nice if they offered the cloud version.

author: Enrique V.
pros: The ability to aggregate Active Directory logs
cons: The interface is a bit clunky and not as intuitive as I would have hoped.

review_title: Set it and forget it type product
author: Alex M.
pros: Once configured the product is very hands-off.
cons: Bit of a complicated setup in that it’s not intuitive in some areas. The user interface feels old but is functional.

description: It has been ok. The reports are good but not all the features are there.
author: Kenny P.
pros: you can see who made changes to file or removed or added them
cons: You are not able to tell who delete a file. Just removed them.

description: Good product but limited in some aspects-
author: Daniel S.
pros: Friendly interface and responsive support.
cons: It is not optimized in most cases you are limited.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
